list.title: Mouja Master

filters.search: Search by Mouja Number or Name...

validation.moujaNoFormat: Invalid format. Only English letters, numbers, and underscore are allowed.
validation.moujaNoEnglishOnly: Only English letters, numbers, and underscore are allowed. Marathi/Hindi not supported.
validation.moujaNoExists: This Mouja Number already exists. Please use a different number.
validation.moujaNameFormat: Only letters (any language), numbers, spaces, and basic punctuation allowed (,./-()).
validation.moujaNameExists: Mouja name already exists. Please enter a different name.
validation.mustBeActive: Mouja must be active to save

delete.confirmDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this mouja record?
delete.errorMessage: Cannot delete Mouja ({id}) because it is linked to other records.

apiErrors.duplicateCode: Mouja number already exists. Please use a different number.
apiErrors.duplicateName: Mouja name already exists. Please use a different name.
apiErrors.duplicateRecord: Please check Mouja Number and Name - duplicates not allowed.
apiErrors.validationError: Invalid data provided. Please check all fields.
apiErrors.invalidData: Invalid data provided. Please check all fields.
apiErrors.inUse: Cannot deactivate/delete this Mouja because it is referenced in other records.
apiErrors.operationFailed: Operation failed. Please try again later.
apiErrors.linkedRecordError: Cannot modify this mouja because it is linked to other records.

success.created: New mouja created successfully with code: {code}

error.title: Failed to connect server. Please try again later.
